description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a spacious patio. The front of the house is adorned with lush landscaping, including several trees and shrubs, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. A prominent outdoor swimming pool is situated at the rear, surrounded by a paved deck and outdoor seating. The building is primarily white with subtle accents, and the upper floor includes a balcony area overlooking the pool. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with visible interior furnishings such as beds and tables. The overall layout is open and airy, emphasizing indoor-outdoor living and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, lush landscaping, and a rear swimming pool. The design emphasizes open spaces and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the upper floor, interior rooms, and dense landscaping at the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, extensive greenery, and partial view of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and large glass doors leading to the interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and upper balcony, as well as the building's white facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
